metadata.name: Offer a Paid Room Upgrade at Check-in

description: A front desk agent sees that a higher room category is available and offers a paid upgrade to a checking-in guest.

nodes.task_description: While checking in a guest, notice that higher-tier rooms are available.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent identifies an upsell opportunity.

nodes.task_description: Describe the benefits of the upgraded room (e.g., better view, more space) and offer it for a special discounted upgrade fee.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent makes an attractive offer to the guest.

nodes.task_description: If the guest accepts, update their reservation to the new room type and add the upgrade charge to their folio.

expected_outcome.expected: The guest accepts, and the booking is successfully modified.
